indicators.name: White sofa

indicators.name: White coffee table
indicators.rationale: The white coffee table can hold a laptop and other necessary items.

indicators.rationale: The white floor is clean and easy to maintain.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work (solo) due to its comfortable seating, functional furniture, and visually appealing design.
